# User story

As an exporter

I need to be able to see error messages for the required fields, so that I can ensure all required fields are completed

## Acceptance Criteria

Given I have navigated to '/direct-landing' in my catch certificate direct landing user journey update error messages existing mandatory fields.

### Scenario 1 - Unpopulated fields

When I do not provide answers

And I press 'Save and continue'

Then the following field-level errors as well as page-level errors are shown.

| **Field**                                   | **Unpopulated** | **Error message**                                       |
| ------------------------------------------- | --------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| Date landed                                 | Unpopulated     | Enter the date landed                                   |
| Vessel name or port letter and number (PLN) | Unpopulated     | Select or enter a vessel name or port letter and number |
| Export                                      | Unpopulated     | Enter the export weight in kilograms                    |

### Scenario 2

When I provide invalid answers

Then the following field-level errors as well as page-level errors are shown.

| **Field**                                   | **Invalid**                          | **Error message**                                   |
| ------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------- |
| Date landed                                 | Invalid - not a real date            | Enter a valid date landed                           |
| Date landed                                 | Invalid - more than 7 days in future | Date landed must be today or within the next 7 days |
| Vessel name or port letter and number (PLN) | Invalid                              | Select a vessel from the list                       |
| Export Weight                               | Invalid                              | Enter the export weight in kilograms                |

## Welsh translations

Update the corresponding Welsh translations

| **English text**                                        | **Welsh translation**                                            |
| ------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Enter the date landed                                   | Rhowch y dyddiad glanio                                          |
| Enter a valid date landed                               | Rhowch ddyddiad glanio dilys                                     |
| Date landed must be today or within the next 7 days     | Rhaid i'r dyddiad glanio fod heddiw neu o fewn y 7 diwrnod nesaf |
| Select or enter a vessel name or port letter and number | Dewiswch neu rhowch enw llong neu lythyren a rhif porthladd      |
| Select a vessel from the list                           | Dewiswch gwch neu long o'r rhestr                                |
| Enter the export weight in kilograms                    | Rhowch y pwysau allforio mewn cilogramau                         |
